nasb.text: O Lord, You have deceived me and I was deceived; You have overcome me and prevailed. I have become a laughingstock all day long; Everyone mocks me.

esv.text: O Lord, you have deceived me, and I was deceived; you are stronger than I, and you have prevailed. I have become a laughingstock all the day; everyone mocks me.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！你愚弄了我，我受了愚弄； 你比我強大，你勝了我。 我整天成了別人譏笑的對象， 人人都嘲弄我。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 你欺骗我，我被你骗了。 你制服我，胜过我。 如今，我成了人们终日嘲笑、戏弄的对象。
